basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed AI Engineer
basics.summary: Forward Deployed AI Engineer with 7+ years building production-grade AI agents and custom AI solutions for enterprise clients — shipped MCP-native LLM middleware to 100+ users and scaled a product to $1M ARR as technical co-founder. Skilled in Python, prompt engineering, system design, and Technical Leadership bridging AI capabilities and customer workflows.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Designed and implemented production-grade AI agents — built an LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline as the core of aInbox, processing async messages across 100+ beta users with no traditional UI.

Developed a generator/evaluator evaluation framework design that autonomously iterates on agentic code loops via GitHub Actions CI/CD, closing improvement cycles in under 24 hours across multiple AI product prototypes.

Integrated AI into customer workflows end-to-end: implemented OAuth 2.0 authorization and Streamable HTTP transport for MCP servers, resolving multi-week integration edge cases across Claude and ChatGPT client implementations.

Architected multi-tenant AWS infrastructure (EC2, Aurora Serverless, SES, IAM, SCPs) with automated tenant isolation, supporting concurrent AI product deployments without per-customer infrastructure rework.
Optimized prompt engineering strategies and codified shared AI-context conventions that standardized LLM behavior across multiple experimental AI products.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Led Technical Leadership of a cross-functional engineering team of 10 — shipped PHP/Node.js/Python/Vue stack on Kubernetes and Docker, scaling the product to $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years.

Engaged directly with enterprise clients to design custom solutions, scope technical requirements, and uncover workflow pain points — converting 3 strategic accounts within 3 months and informing product roadmap via cohort analytics.
Designed custom AI-adjacent retention mechanics (gamified coupon drops, prize draws, shareable campaign sites) integrated into customer workflows for 100+ mall and SME enterprise clients.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Led end-to-end development and production launch of a doctor-patient engagement platform, increasing engagement by 30%.
Drove customer-facing growth strategies that acquired 50,000+ users in 6 months through targeted outreach and workflow optimization.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built aInbox, a production-grade AI agent middleware giving LLMs a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer — custom AI solution operated entirely via Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with LLM-driven triage integrated into user workflows.
Shipped multi-provider integration supporting ChatGPT and Claude with optimized prompt engineering strategies for triage and labeling, scaled to 100+ beta users.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built AgentFolio, an open-source agentic portfolio engine (MIT-licensed) that generates JD-tailored resumes using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines with a GitHub Actions automation pipeline.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Hosted Claude Code terminal + auto-evolving agentic workflow scaffold
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io, a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2, and a skill-based self-evolution scaffold enabling autonomous AI-driven code loops via GitHub Actions.

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year).
Submitted a bug-fix pull request to Anthropic's public Claude Agent SDK demos repository for an issue discovered while integrating the released SDK.
